# KPI Framework & Metrics — Hotel Partner Success Platform
*Aditi Mishra | Product Analytics*

---

## North Star Metric

**Active Partner GMV Growth** — Month-over-month increase in total bookings value generated by partners actively using the Partner Success Console (at least 3 logins/month).

*Why this?* The platform exists to grow OTA revenue through better partner performance. This metric captures both partner health AND business impact in one number.

---

## Metric Tree

```
NORTH STAR: Active Partner GMV Growth (MoM %)
│
├── PLATFORM ADOPTION
│   ├── Partner Console DAU / MAU
│   ├── Feature Adoption Rate (% using each of 3 modules)
│   ├── Time to First Action (after onboarding)
│   └── Monthly Active Partners (used console ≥1x)
│
├── PRICING MODULE
│   ├── Pricing Competitiveness Index (% partners within market range)
│   ├── Price Recommendation Accept Rate (%)
│   ├── RevPAR lift for active vs. inactive partners
│   └── Pricing Dashboard WAU
│
├── HEALTH SCORE MODULE
│   ├── Health Score Distribution (% in each tier)
│   ├── Score Improvement Rate (% partners who improved week-over-week)
│   ├── Platinum Tier Conversion Rate
│   └── Churn Rate by Score Band
│
├── NUDGE ENGINE
│   ├── Nudge Delivery Rate (%)
│   ├── Nudge Action Rate (% who act on nudge within 2 hours)
│   ├── Inventory Recovery Rate (rooms opened via nudge / total alerted)
│   └── Last-Minute Discount Conversion Rate
│
└── BUSINESS OUTCOMES
    ├── Partner Churn Rate (annual)
    ├── Avg GMV per Active Partner (monthly)
    ├── Platform Booking Conversion Rate (search → booking)
    └── Partner NPS
```

---

## Key Metrics with Targets

### Platform Adoption

| Metric | Baseline | Month 3 | Month 12 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Console MAU | 0 (new) | 2,000 partners | 15,000 partners |
| Feature Adoption — Pricing Dashboard | — | 60% | 80% |
| Feature Adoption — Health Score | — | 75% | 90% |
| Feature Adoption — Nudge Engine | — | 55% | 75% |
| Time to First Action | — | <10 min | <5 min |

### Pricing Module

| Metric | Baseline | Target |
|---|---|---|
| Pricing Competitiveness Index | 62% within market | 81% within market |
| Price Recommendation Accept Rate | — | >45% |
| RevPAR lift (active vs. inactive) | 0% | +18–25% |

### Health Score Module

| Metric | Baseline | Target |
|---|---|---|
| % Partners in Platinum (80+) | ~5% | 20% by Month 12 |
| % Partners in At-Risk (<40) | ~25% | <10% by Month 12 |
| Score Improvement Rate (week-over-week) | — | 35% of partners improving |

### Nudge Engine

| Metric | Definition | Target |
|---|---|---|
| Nudge Action Rate | % who act on nudge within 2 hours | >40% |
| Inventory Recovery Rate | Rooms opened via nudge / rooms alerted | >55% |
| Dead Inventory Alert CTR | % who accept last-minute discount suggestion | >30% |

### Business Outcomes

| Metric | Baseline | Target |
|---|---|---|
| **Partner Churn Rate** | ~20% annually | **<14% annually** |
| Avg GMV per Active Partner | ₹2.4L/month | ₹3.1L/month (+29%) |
| Partner NPS | Unknown | >40 |
| Platform Booking Conversion | Baseline | +3–5pp |

---

## A/B Testing Plan

### Test 1: Health Score Visibility
- **Hypothesis**: Partners who see their Health Score on login screen take more improvement actions than those who don't
- **Control**: Score shown only in "Analytics" tab
- **Treatment**: Score shown prominently on dashboard homepage
- **Primary Metric**: Number of improvement actions taken per week (photo uploads, price updates, listing edits)
- **Sample**: 500 partners per variant | 4 weeks

### Test 2: Nudge Timing
- **Hypothesis**: Nudges sent at 9 AM get higher action rates than nudges sent at 3 PM
- **Control**: Nudge at 3 PM
- **Treatment**: Nudge at 9 AM
- **Primary Metric**: Nudge Action Rate within 2 hours
- **Sample**: All nudge-eligible partners split 50/50 | 2 weeks

### Test 3: Price Recommendation Framing
- **Hypothesis**: Showing revenue impact ("Estimated +₹5,600 this weekend") drives higher acceptance than showing price change ("Drop to ₹2,650")
- **Control**: "Recommended price: ₹2,650"
- **Treatment**: "Accept this change → Earn est. ₹5,600 more this weekend"
- **Primary Metric**: Price Recommendation Accept Rate
- **Sample**: 1,000 partners per variant | 3 weeks

---

## Partner Health Score — Calculation Detail

```
Health Score = 
  (Pricing Competitiveness Score × 0.25) +
  (Inventory Availability Score × 0.25) +
  (Response Rate Score × 0.20) +
  (Guest Review Score × 0.20) +
  (Listing Completeness Score × 0.10)
```

### Dimension Scoring Rules

**Pricing Competitiveness (0–25 pts)**
- Within ±5% of market median → 25 pts
- 5–10% above → 20 pts
- 10–20% above → 12 pts
- >20% above → 5 pts
- Below market → 22 pts (slight discount acceptable)

**Inventory Availability (0–25 pts)**
- >90% rooms available in peak periods → 25 pts
- 75–90% → 20 pts
- 60–75% → 12 pts
- <60% → 5 pts

**Response Rate (0–20 pts)**
- Avg response <1 hour → 20 pts
- 1–2 hours → 17 pts
- 2–4 hours → 12 pts
- 4–8 hours → 7 pts
- >8 hours → 2 pts

**Guest Review Score (0–20 pts)**
- ≥4.5 rating → 20 pts
- 4.0–4.4 → 16 pts
- 3.5–3.9 → 10 pts
- 3.0–3.4 → 5 pts
- <3.0 → 1 pt

**Listing Completeness (0–10 pts)**
- 15+ photos + all fields filled → 10 pts
- 10–14 photos + most fields → 7 pts
- 5–9 photos → 4 pts
- <5 photos → 1 pt

---

## Reporting Cadence

| Report | Audience | Frequency |
|---|---|---|
| Partner Health Score | Hotel partner | Weekly (Monday) |
| GMV Performance Dashboard | OTA Revenue team | Daily |
| Nudge Effectiveness Report | Product team | Weekly |
| Churn Risk Report (At-Risk partners) | Account Management | Weekly |
| Platform Health Summary | Leadership | Monthly |
